subcodes.first_line: O son-in-law of His Holiness Salman! Thy letter was received. Knowest thou to what degree 'Abdu'l-Bahá is immersed in the sea of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صهر حضرت سلمان نامه شما رسید هیچ میدانی که عبدالبهاء بچه درجه غریق دریای
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
